data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"To claim the death benefit, the beneficiary must submit: (a) Completed claim form, (b) Certified copy of the death certificate, (c) Original policy document (if available)."
<hyperedge>"4.1 'Death Benefit' means the amount payable to the beneficiary upon the death of the insured during the policy term."
<hyperedge>"Claims should be sent to: SecureLife Insurance Company, Claims Department, P.O. Box 5000, Hartford, CT 06102."
<hyperedge>"4.2 'Premium Due Date' means the 15th day of each month."
<hyperedge>"6.1 Premiums are due monthly on the 15th of each month."
<hyperedge>"If the premium is not paid by the end of the grace period, the policy will lapse and coverage will terminate."
<hyperedge>"We will pay valid claims within 30 days of receiving all required documentation."
<hyperedge>"4.3 'Grace Period' means the 31-day period following the premium due date during which coverage continues without lapse."
<hyperedge>"6.2 If a premium is not paid by the due date, a grace period of 31 days is allowed. Coverage continues during the grace period."
<hyperedge>"If the insured commits suicide within two years from the issue date, our liability is limited to a refund of premiums paid."
<hyperedge>"We cannot contest this policy after it has been in force during the insured's lifetime for two years from the issue date."
<hyperedge>"4.4 'Policy Anniversary' means the same day and month as the issue date in each subsequent year."
<hyperedge>"6.3 If the premium is not paid by the end of the grace period, the policy will lapse and coverage will terminate."
<hyperedge>"Conversion must occur before the earlier of: (a) The policy expiry date, or (b) The insured's 65th birthday."
<hyperedge>"If the age or sex of the insured has been misstated, we will adjust the death benefit to what the premiums paid would have purchased at the correct age and sex."
<hyperedge>"No other exclusions apply to this policy."
<hyperedge>"The premium for the new policy will be based on: (a) The insured's attained age at conversion, (b) The amount of coverage converted, (c) The class of permanent policy selected."
<hyperedge>"You may assign this policy. We are not responsible for the validity of any assignment. An assignment is not binding on us until we receive written notice at our home office."

<hyperedge>"5.1 We will pay the death benefit to the beneficiary if: (a) The insured dies while this policy is in force, and (b) We receive proof of death acceptable to us, and (c) The death occurs before the policy expiry date."
<hyperedge>"You may convert this policy to a permanent life insurance policy without evidence of insurability."
<hyperedge>"Authorized Signature: ___________________________ Chief Underwriting Officer SecureLife Insurance Company Date Issued: January 15, 2024."
<hyperedge>"5.2 The death benefit will be paid in one lump sum unless the beneficiary chooses an alternate settlement option."
